title: specify statement "(A- => B) = 1" causes syntax error if "read_verilog -specify"

features.name: edge_sensitive_specify_operator_minus
features.description: Code should include a specify block with edge-sensitive timing check using the falling edge operator A-

features.name: edge_sensitive_specify_operator_plus
features.description: Code should include a specify block with edge-sensitive timing check using the rising edge operator A+

features.name: multi_value_timing_check
features.description: Code should include a specify block with a timing check containing multiple output values in parentheses

features.name: specparam_with_triple_colon
features.description: Code should include a specify block with a specparam declaration using triple colon syntax for min:typ:max values

features.name: specparam_array_assignment
features.description: Code should include a specify block with a specparam array assignment with bit slice
